title: Biofuels Processing Technicians
description: Calculate, measure, load, mix, and process refined feedstock with additives in fermentation or reaction process vessels and monitor production process. Perform, and keep records of, plant maintenance, repairs, and safety inspections.

tasks.text: Monitor batch, continuous flow, or hybrid biofuels production processes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Operate valves, pumps, engines, or generators to control and adjust biofuels production.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Monitor and record biofuels processing data.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Collect biofuels samples and perform routine laboratory tests or analyses to assess biofuels quality.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Operate equipment, such as a centrifuge, to extract biofuels products and secondary by-products or reusable fractions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Process refined feedstock with additives in fermentation or reaction process vessels.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Operate chemical processing equipment for the production of biofuels.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Monitor and record flow meter performance.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Inspect biofuels plant or processing equipment regularly, recording or reporting damage and mechanical problems.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Measure and monitor raw biofuels feedstock.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Preprocess feedstock in preparation for physical, chemical, or biological fuel production processes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Calculate, measure, load, or mix refined feedstock used in biofuels production.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Monitor stored biofuels products or secondary by-products until reused or transferred to users.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Assess the quality of biofuels additives for reprocessing.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Clean biofuels processing work area, ensuring compliance with safety regulations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform routine maintenance on mechanical, electrical, or electronic equipment or instruments used in the processing of biofuels.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Calibrate liquid flow devices and meters, including fuel, chemical, and water meters.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Rebuild, repair, or replace biofuels processing equipment components.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Coordinate raw product sourcing or collection.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
